dj_text: We're going from Vance Joy - Riptide [Bardcore / Medieval Cover], right into Rihanna - Umbrella [Bardcore / Medieval Style Cover]. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: This break was supposed to be an ad but we forgot to sell one. So here's 10 seconds of me making mouth noises. mmm.
hijack_text: Truth Frequency Radio from the Mirror Dimension.
recovery_text: I swear someone left the interdimensional frequency door open.
title: Rihanna - Umbrella [Bardcore / Medieval Style Cover]
